description:
Law enforcement suspects a link between two separate investigations. Use Autopsy's Central Repository with a SQLite database to identify overlapping evidence between 'Operation_Alpha' (Case Number 'INV-01', source: /home/ga/evidence/suspect_alpha.dd) and 'Operation_Beta' (Case Number 'INV-02', source: /home/ga/evidence/suspect_beta.dd). Use the Correlation Engine to identify files in the Beta case that match files from the Alpha case by MD5 hash, noting that filenames may differ. Write an intelligence brief to /home/ga/Reports/cross_case_intelligence.txt using the following format:

CENTRAL_REPO_CONFIGURED: YES
TOTAL_OVERLAPPING_FILES: [count]
MATCH: <md5_hash> | <filename_in_beta> | <filename_in_alpha>
